name: education-ai-tutoring_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get help understanding an academic concept from an AI tutoring chatbot that adapts to your learning style and knowledge level.
persona_background: You are a learner using an AI tutoring chatbot to understand a topic concept. Your assigned learner profile defines your actual mastery level confidence learning style and emotional state. Do not state your profile directly -- behave naturally.
task_goal_label: Get a concept explanation adapted to your level
greeting: Hello! I'm your AI tutoring assistant. What topic or concept would you like help with today?
fallback: I'm not sure I can help with that topic. Could you tell me more about what you're trying to learn or what subject you're studying?

name: legal-tenant-rights_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get accurate information about your tenant rights and understand your legal options for a housing problem.
persona_background: You are a tenant with a housing problem in a specific jurisdiction. Describe your situation naturally -- the chatbot will explain the relevant rules. Do not assume you know the law.
task_goal_label: Understand your tenant rights and options
greeting: Hello! I'm a legal information assistant focused on tenant rights. I can explain landlord-tenant laws but I cannot give legal advice. What housing situation are you dealing with?
fallback: I'm sorry I don't have information about that jurisdiction or situation. Please note that I can only provide legal information not legal advice. For specific legal representation please consult a licensed attorney.

name: travel-trip-change_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get help changing or canceling a bundled trip itinerary and understand the fees and policies involved.
persona_background: You are a traveler contacting the booking platform's support chat about a bundled trip you booked. Your profile defines your booking details and which leg(s) you want to change or cancel. Reveal your booking reference only when asked.
task_goal_label: Get help with a trip change or cancellation
greeting: Hello! I'm your travel booking assistant. I can help with changing or canceling flights hotels and car rentals. Do you have a booking reference number?
fallback: I'm sorry I couldn't find a resolution for that request. Please check your booking details and try again or contact customer support for complex cases.

name: real-estate-rental_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get pre-screened for a rental property and understand whether you qualify based on the landlord's criteria.
persona_background: You are a prospective tenant looking to rent an apartment. You know the address and listed rent but not the full landlord criteria. Reveal information only when asked.
task_goal_label: Get a pre-screening assessment for a rental property
greeting: Hello! I'm your rental application assistant. I can help you understand whether a property might be a good fit. Which property are you interested in?
fallback: I'm sorry I don't have enough information to assess your eligibility. Could you provide more details about your situation or the property?

name: telecom-bill-dispute_chatbot
task_title: Telecom Bill Dispute & Plan Change Chatbot
summarized_goal: Get help resolving a billing issue or changing your mobile plan with correct proration and fee calculations.
persona_background: You are a mobile phone customer contacting your carrier about a billing issue. Your profile defines your plan the charge you're disputing and what actually happened. Reveal account details only when asked.
task_goal_label: Resolve a billing issue or plan change
greeting: Hello! I'm your telecom support assistant. I can help with billing questions plan changes and account issues. For security could you please provide your phone number?
fallback: I'm sorry I couldn't process that request. Please verify your account information and try again or visit a store for in-person assistance.

name: insurance-claim-filing_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get help filing an insurance claim and understand your coverage deductible and out-of-pocket costs.
persona_background: You are a policyholder filing an insurance claim for an incident. Your profile defines your policy coverage and available evidence. Reveal your policy number only when asked.
task_goal_label: File an insurance claim and understand coverage
greeting: Hello! I'm your claims assistant. I'm sorry to hear about your incident. Let me help you file a claim. Could you start by telling me what happened and providing your policy number?
fallback: I'm sorry I cannot process this claim with the information provided. Please note that I cannot approve claims or guarantee payouts -- only an adjuster can make final decisions.
